reference: THERE DON'T MIND ME SHE SAID SHARPLY AND GETTING UP SHE LOOKED DOWN AT HER DRESS AND THIN SHOES AND SEEMING TO RECOLLECT HERSELF SHE TOOK THE CANDLE HE HAD JUST SET DOWN AND WENT SWIFTLY TO HER ROOM
text: There, don't mind me," she said sharply; and getting up she looked down at her dress and thin shoes; and seeming to recollect herself, she took the candle he had just set down and went swiftly to her room.
